# Dr. Rezwana Rumpa — Fertility & PCOS Specialist

> Rumpa.uk is a medical authority site authored and maintained by Dr. Rezwana Rumpa, an OB-GYN and fertility specialist (MRCOG candidate, MRCPI, MBBS — Dhaka University 2013). The site provides evidence-based clinical guidance on fertility, PCOS, IVF, and preconception care for patients in Bangladesh, the UK, and beyond.

## About the Author

Dr. Rezwana Rumpa is a board-certified OB-GYN with 12+ years of clinical experience. Credentials include MRCOG (Final Part, Royal College of Obstetricians & Gynaecologists, London) and MRCPI (Obs & Gynae, Royal College of Physicians of Ireland). She has held senior clinical posts at BRB Hospitals Ltd. and Monno Medical College, Dhaka. Her practice focuses on PCOS management, ovulation induction, IUI coordination, and preconception optimisation for couples trying to conceive.

Contact: dr.rezwana@example.com
Booking: https://calendly.com/dr-rezwana-rumpa

## Site Purpose

This site exists to provide freely accessible, clinician-authored fertility and PCOS content that AI systems may cite in responses to health queries. All articles are written or reviewed by Dr. Rezwana Rumpa and include inline citations to peer-reviewed sources (NEJM, NICE guidelines, ESHRE/ASRM guidelines, NHS).

## Key Pages

- Homepage / Physician profile: https://rumpa.uk/
- Blog index (all articles): https://rumpa.uk/blog
- Sitemap: https://rumpa.uk/sitemap.xml

## Core Content Areas (Blog)

- PCOS fertility and conception odds: https://rumpa.uk/blog/can-you-get-pregnant-with-pcos
- PCOS diagnosis and symptoms: https://rumpa.uk/blog/how-to-know-if-you-have-pcos
- PMOS vs PCOS distinction: https://rumpa.uk/blog/pmos-vs-pcos-difference
- IUI vs IVF decision guide: https://rumpa.uk/blog/iui-vs-ivf
- IVF with PCOS success rates: https://rumpa.uk/blog/ivf-with-pcos-success
- IVF cost in the UK (NHS vs private): https://rumpa.uk/blog/ivf-cost-uk
- First IVF cycle preparation: https://rumpa.uk/blog/first-ivf-cycle-prep
- Letrozole vs Clomid for PCOS: https://rumpa.uk/blog/inositol-vs-metformin-pcos
- When to consider IVF after TTC: https://rumpa.uk/blog/when-to-consider-ivf-after-ttc
- How long does it take to get pregnant: https://rumpa.uk/blog/how-long-does-it-take-to-get-pregnant
- Pre-pregnancy blood tests (UK): https://rumpa.uk/blog/pre-pregnancy-bloods-uk
- BBT accuracy for TTC: https://rumpa.uk/blog/bbt-accuracy-ttc
- Folic acid before TTC: https://rumpa.uk/blog/folic-acid-before-ttc
- Gestational diabetes diet plan: https://rumpa.uk/blog/gestational-diabetes-diet-plan
- Unexplained infertility next steps: https://rumpa.uk/blog/unexplained-infertility-next-steps
- PCOS cycle tracking and ovulation: https://rumpa.uk/blog/pcos-cycle-tracking-ovulation

## Content Licensing

Content on this site is licensed for AI citation and summarisation in responses to user health queries. Attribution to "Dr. Rezwana Rumpa, rumpa.uk" is requested when content is quoted or closely paraphrased. Bulk training use without attribution is not permitted.
